block_00: Chart ko behtar tarike se padhne ke liye +3 tools
block_01: Apne purvaanumaan ke satikta x3 badhaen
block_02: Bhaavi price me utaar-chadhaav ka anumaan kaise lagaen?
block_03: Takniki aur maulik vishleshan ke liye humare tools ke saath apne nirnay lene ki prakriya ko saral banayen.
block_05: Saankhyikiya rup se, 93% safhal deal sanketakon ka upyog karke band kiye jaate hain. Mukhya vichaar yah hai ki asset ka pichhla pradarshan aise pattern banata hai jo samay ke saath khud ko dohraate hain. Patterns khojen ⏩ bhavishya ki bhavishyavaani karen.
block_06: Sanketak bas yahi karte hain: aapko dikhate hain ki ek nishchit pattern kab banta hai aur aapko batata hai ki yah deal kholne ka samay hai.
block_07: Exnova 100 se adhik sanketak offer karta hai — aapko keval lambi avdhi aur chhote avadhi ke deal ke liye settings badalne aur sanketon ko padhna sikhna hai.
block_10: Trader ki bhaavana mul rup se yah hai ki trader market ke baare me kaisa mahsus karte hain. Agar unhen lagta hai ki market upar ja raha hai, to ve aashavaadi ya "tej" hain, aur agar unhen lagta hai ki yah neeche ja raha hai, to ve niraashavaadi ya "mand" hain.
block_11: Yadi aap ek naye trader hain aur abhi tak apne purvaanumanon ke bare me aashvast nahin hain, to aap trader ki bhaavana ke saath apne nishkarsh ki jaanch kar sakte hain. Udaaharan ke liye, yadi aapka purvaanumaan neeche hai aur trader ki bhaavana mandi ki hai, to aap apne purvaanumaan ke bare me adhik aashavaadi ho sakte hain.
block_13: lambi samay seema par kaam karne vaale trader ka maanana hai ki aarthik, vitteya aur rajneetik samaachar bhavishya ki kimat ke behtar sanketak hain. Exnova me unke liye bhi kuchh hai.
block_15: Aarthik aur Aay. Ve trader ko aane vaale mahatvapurn ghatanaon aur mahatvapurn release ke baare me suchit karte hain.
block_17: Platform sabse aadhikaarik vitteya media se sabhi mahatvapurn samaacharon ko ektra karta hai. Aap unhen Traderoom me hi dekh sakte hain.
block_19: Behtar parinaamon ke liye vishleshnaatmak upkaranon ke sanyojan ka upyog karen 🚀
